prompt_text:
### Demographics: 43-year-old Asian woman

### Visit type: Follow-up visit (12-month follow-up)

### Reason for visit / current symptoms
Reason for visit: Routine follow-up (every 3 months) | Diagnosis context: 8 years ago Diagnosed with type 2 diabetes after hyperglycemia symptoms (polyuria, polydipsia, weight loss)
Current symptoms: Reports 1-2 mild hypoglycemia episodes per month (self-resolved); no DKA/HHS signs

### History
- Other conditions: Chronic kidney disease Stage 3a (45-59)
ASCVD: Coronary artery disease (History of CABG)
Body mass index category: Overweight
Rheumatoid Arthritis
Recurrent Complicated Urinary Tract Infections
Psychotic Disorder on Atypical Antipsychotics
Chronic Obstructive Pulmonary Disease
- Diabetes-related comorbidities: CKD: Stage 3a (45-59); HF (No); ASCVD: Coronary artery disease (History of CABG); MASLD: Normal; BMI Category: Overweight
- Family history: Family history of type 2 diabetes not assessed
- Social history: Never smoker; No alcohol use

### Medication information
- Current medications: Metformin 1000mg twice daily; Dulaglutide 1.5mg once weekly; Quetiapine (150 mg nightly), Methotrexate (15 mg weekly), Fluticasone/salmeterol Inhaler (twice daily), Rosuvastatin (10 mg daily), Lisinopril (10 mg daily), Finerenone (10 mg daily), Nitrofurantoin (100 mg twice daily for prophylaxis)

### Physical exam (current)
Weight 65.4 kg; Height 165.1 cm; BMI 24.0 kg/m²; Blood pressure 117/67 mmHg

### Laboratory values (with date / relative timing)
Format: YYYY-MM-DD value or relative timing (12 months ago / 9 months ago / 6 months ago / 3 months ago / current)
Order: 12 months ago -> 9 months ago -> 6 months ago -> 3 months ago -> current
- Glycemia: HbA1c (12 months ago 10.5%; 9 months ago 10.5%; 6 months ago 10.0%; 3 months ago 9.5%; current 6.8%), FPG (12 months ago 284mg/dL; 9 months ago 303mg/dL; 6 months ago 216mg/dL; 3 months ago 203mg/dL; current 164mg/dL)
- Anthropometrics / blood pressure: Weight (12 months ago 65.1kg; 9 months ago 66.3kg; 6 months ago 63.2kg; 3 months ago 62.8kg; current 65.4kg), Height (12 months ago 165.1cm; 9 months ago 165.1cm; 6 months ago 165.1cm; 3 months ago 165.1cm; current 165.1cm), BMI (12 months ago 24.0kg/m²; 9 months ago 24.0kg/m²; 6 months ago 23.0kg/m²; 3 months ago 23.0kg/m²; current 24.0kg/m²), SBP (12 months ago 120mmHg; 9 months ago 120mmHg; 6 months ago 120mmHg; 3 months ago 120mmHg; current 117mmHg), DBP (12 months ago 63mmHg; 9 months ago 64mmHg; 6 months ago 65mmHg; 3 months ago 67mmHg; current 67mmHg)
- Liver function: ALT (12 months ago 10U/L; 9 months ago 16U/L; 6 months ago 17U/L; 3 months ago 10U/L; current 13U/L), AST (12 months ago 18U/L; 9 months ago 10U/L; 6 months ago 18U/L; 3 months ago 16U/L; current 14U/L), Total Bilirubin (12 months ago 0.4mg/dL; 9 months ago 0.3mg/dL; 6 months ago 0.4mg/dL; 3 months ago 0.4mg/dL; current 0.3mg/dL)
- Kidney: eGFR (12 months ago 56mL/min/1.73m²; 9 months ago 52mL/min/1.73m²; 6 months ago 51mL/min/1.73m²; 3 months ago 54mL/min/1.73m²; current 52mL/min/1.73m²), UACR (12 months ago 73mg/g; 9 months ago 59mg/g; 6 months ago 64mg/g; 3 months ago 70mg/g; current 46mg/g)
- Lipids: LDL (12 months ago 90mg/dL; 9 months ago 96mg/dL; 6 months ago 95mg/dL; 3 months ago 94mg/dL; current 92mg/dL); HDL (12 months ago 45mg/dL; 9 months ago 41mg/dL; 6 months ago 42mg/dL; 3 months ago 42mg/dL; current 43mg/dL); Triglycerides (12 months ago 170mg/dL; 9 months ago 155mg/dL; 6 months ago 167mg/dL; 3 months ago 168mg/dL; current 162mg/dL)
- Hemoglobin: Hemoglobin (12 months ago 12.0g/dL; 9 months ago 11.2g/dL; 6 months ago 11.9g/dL; 3 months ago 12.0g/dL; current 11.6g/dL)
- Additional tests: urine ketone Not measured (Current); fasting C-peptide Not measured (Current)

### Individualized treatment decision factors
Current adherence and self-management: Excellent adherence (estimated ≥90%); SMBG 4-5 times/week; diet/exercise well controlled.
Financial context: Patient has comprehensive insurance with minimal out-of-pocket burden and reports no financial barriers to clinically indicated therapies (budget ≤ KRW 1,000,000/month).
